'''ranate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:katabatically|katabatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:katabatically|katabatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ranate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ranate|ranate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ranatesher|ranatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranatesherĂ«m|ranatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ranatero|ranatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ranateshĂ«|ranateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranateshĂ«m|ranateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiranatero|gokiranatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiranateshĂ«|gokiranateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranateshĂ«m|gokiranateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goranankerom|goranankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goranankeshĂ«|goranankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranankeshĂ«m|goranankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goranankeya|goranankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ranaterom|ranaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranatemu|ranatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ranateya|ranateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiranaterom|gokiranaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranatemu|gokiranatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiranateya|gokiranateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rananate|rananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rananatesher|rananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rananatesherĂ«m|rananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rananatero|rananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rananateshĂ«|rananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rananateshĂ«m|rananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirananatero|gokirananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirananateshĂ«|gokirananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirananateshĂ«m|gokirananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorananankerom|gorananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorananankeshĂ«|gorananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorananankeshĂ«m|gorananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorananankeya|gorananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rananaterom|rananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rananatemu|rananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rananateya|rananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirananaterom|gokirananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirananatemu|gokirananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirananateya|gokirananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠte|rĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠtesher|rĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠtero|rĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠnĂŠtero|gokirĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠterom|rĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠtemu|rĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠteya|rĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠnĂŠterom|gokirĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠnĂŠteya|gokirĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafnafte|rafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafnaftesher|rafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafnaftesherĂ«m|rafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafnaftero|rafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafnafteshĂ«|rafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafnafteshĂ«m|rafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafnaftero|gokirafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafnafteshĂ«|gokirafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafnafteshĂ«m|gokirafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafnafnkerom|gorafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafnafnkeshĂ«|gorafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafnafnkeshĂ«m|gorafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafnafnkeya|gorafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafnafterom|rafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafnaftemu|rafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafnafteya|rafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafnafterom|gokirafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafnaftemu|gokirafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafnafteya|gokirafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
